The '''Galactic Alliance Defense Force''' ('''GADF'''), also known as the '''Galactic Alliance Armed Forces''' or the '''Galactic Alliance military''', were the military forces of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]]. Like its predecessor, the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|Combined Defense Forces of the New Republic]], the GADF comprised the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]], [[Galactic Alliance Starfighter Corps]], and the [[Galactic Alliance Army]].

==History==
===After the Fall of Coruscant===
Following the near total breakdown of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in the aftermath of the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]], the remaining senators and military units regrouped on [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], which had thus far been outside the invasion corridor. As the New Republic struggled to re-establish order and elect a new [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]], the New Republic Defense Force remained on the defensive, scattered amongst numerous worlds and commanders. Some, like [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]], continued to take orders from the Defense Force high command. Others, like [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]], gathered remaining fleet units and held on to individual regions of space, acting independent of the government. All of this began to change following the [[New Republic Presidential election, 28 ABY|Chief of State election]]. When [[Cal Omas]] was elected the new Chief of State, the government began to reform and reorganize. The new stability in the government was coupled by the return of aging retired admiral [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]], who worked with Chief Omas and then-current [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Sien Sovv]] to ready the New Republic military for a major offensive. Following the major victory at the [[Battle of Ebaq]], the New Republic was integrated into the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] along with the [[Imperial Remnant]] and [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]].

===Victory over the Yuuzhan Vong===
The Galactic Alliance Defense Force was initially established out of the former New Republic Defense Force following the reorganization of the government into the new Galactic Alliance. The fleets of the Galactic Alliance slowly began to turn the tide of battle, liberating key worlds like [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]] and [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul]]. Despite some setbacks, like the [[Battle of Bilbringi (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Bilbringi]], the Defense Force continued to gather its strength in preparation for the coming end of the war. The fleets of the Defense Force defended Mon Calamari from [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|invasion]] and led the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]].

===Post war years, 30- 35 ABY===
Following the end of the war against the Yuuzhan Vong, the Defense Force remained active. It was expanded to five strategic fleets, a direct nod to the previous five fleet structure of the old NRDF. With the majority of the known [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] allied with the new government, the Defense Force concentrated on routing out the numerous pirate bands that rose up following the war. As the galaxy continued its reconstruction, the Defense Force worked alongside the [[New Jedi Order]] in bringing stability and maintaining the peace.

===The Swarm War===
The first major conflict that the Defense Force fought following the resolution of the Yuuzhan Vong war occurred in [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]], when the [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] hives were rediscovered in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. The subsequent campaign, known as the [[Swarm War]], nearly erupted into full scale galactic conflict. Defense Force fleets participated in numerous engagements, including the [[Battle of Nickel One|defense of the Roche Asteroids]] and the [[Battle of Tenupe]].

===Second Galactic Civil War===
In the years following the resolution of the Swarm War, some of the more independent Alliance member worlds began to view the government as a new Empire, due to increased regulations. This crisis threatened to blow up into a [[Second Galactic Civil War|new civil war]]. As diplomatic efforts on both sides began to break down, the Defense Force deployed a task force of the [[Second Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Second Fleet]] to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] in a display of military might.

Shortly after the breaking of the blockade, [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] and [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] joined Corellia, and the [[Confederation]] was formed, along with the newly unified [[Confederation Fleet]]. Other planets soon followed; Fondor, [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]], and [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]] prominent among them. During this time, the GADF and the Confederation Fleet were locked in a state of standoff, with both sides concentrating more on preparing for an inevitable war rather than a direct assault; instead making sporadic and minor raids against each other.

Thus the [[Battle of Gilatter VIII]] was the first major fleet action against one another. Actions intensified in [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan Space]], as Alliance fleet units engaged a Bothan flotilla during the [[Battle of Bothawui (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Bothawui]].

===Sith–Imperial War===
[[File:SWLEG22-PC.jpg|thumb|300px|Galactic Alliance Core Fleet]]
The [[Sith–Imperial War]] ended with the defeat of the Galactic Alliance, following the loss of their capital of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. While most of the galaxy was subsequently once again under the control of the new [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Empire]], the remnants of the Galactic Alliance military, in the form of the [[Core Fleet|Galactic Alliance Core Fleet]], continued the fight against the Empire, which itself broke off into two rival factions, one of which stayed loyal to the deposed Emperor [[Roan Fel]]. The other remained under the control of Darth Krayt, who usurped Fel's throne and claimed the Empire for himself. It was against the Sith's faction that both the Core Fleet and Roan Fel's faction continued to fight against.

==Organization==
===Command===
The Galactic Alliance Defense Force was under the overall command of the [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]], who was appointed by the [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] and approved by the [[Galactic Alliance Senate|Senate]]. The Supreme Commander, who in keeping with tradition was a full admiral, served as the highest uniformed officer in the Defense Force, answering only to the Chief of State. The GADF mantained its headquarters on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], in the new [[Defense Force Command Compound]]. Presumably [[Galactic Alliance High Command]] also had oversight of the Defense Force.

===Fleet===
The naval forces of the GADF was known as the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet|Galactic Alliance Navy]], or "Defense Fleet". The overall structure of the fleet was modeled on the older [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Navy]], with five strategic fleets serving as main units of operation for the Alliance. It presumably also maintained static sector fleets, coupled with private planetary navies. These federal forces were augmented by fleets of various member states, like the [[Imperial Remnant]] or [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]].

For the first year of the Alliance's existence, the fleets remained fairly unorganized, grouped to individual commanders or assigned to various key worlds, like [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]], [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], or [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. In the final months of the war, the Defense Force was reorganized into the system modeled after the old Defense Force. Numbered fleets were established, forming a strategic arm of the Alliance military.

Original fleets of the navy:

*[[First Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance First Fleet]]
*[[Second Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Second Fleet]]
*[[Third Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Third Fleet]]
*[[Fourth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Fourth Fleet]]
*[[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Fifth Fleet]]

As of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], the Alliance government added the following fleets:

*[[Sixth Fleet|Galactic Alliance Sixth Fleet]]
*[[Seventh Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Seventh Fleet]]
*[[Eighth Fleet|Galactic Alliance Eighth Fleet]]
*[[Ninth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Ninth Fleet]]
[[File:Galactic_Alliance_Troopers.jpg|thumb|right|220px|A Venom Assault Trooper, Galactic Alliance Commando, Intelligence Officer and naval officer.]]

The fleets were reorganized as such before the [[Sith–Imperial War]]:

*[[Core Fleet|Galactic Alliance Core Fleet]]
*[[Colonies Fleet|Galactic Alliance Colonies Fleet]]
*[[Expansion Region Fleet|Galactic Alliance Expansion Region Fleet]]
*[[Mid Rim Fleet|Galactic Alliance Mid Rim Fleet]]
*[[Outer Rim Fleet|Galactic Alliance Outer Rim Fleet]]

====Marines====
In addition to the fleets, the navy kept [[Galactic Alliance Marines|Marines]] as ship-to-ship assault and defense units, just as they did previously in the New Republic Navy.

===Starfighter Corps===
The Defense Force's [[Galactic Alliance Starfighter Corps|Starfighter Corps]] was the successor of the New Republic version. [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] was just as famous as it was in the previous.

===Army===
Like its forerunner the [[New Republic Army]], the [[Galactic Alliance Army|ground forces]] of the Galactic Alliance were the less glamorous of the three components of the Defense Force, but no less important. Alliance ground forces and commando units played a major role in several ground engagements during the latter portion of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], including the capture of [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]] and the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]].
